seoTitle: North Willoughby vs North Wollongong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Willoughby and North Wollongong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Willoughby vs North Wollongong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Willoughby and North Wollongong.
heading: North Willoughby vs North Wollongong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Willoughby, New South Wales and North Wollongong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Wollongong has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to North Willoughby (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Willoughby or North Wollongong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Willoughby has a flood risk score of 53/100, while North Wollongong scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Willoughby scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. North Wollongong scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Willoughby or North Wollongong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Wollongong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
